title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian Darksaber 24-Inch LED Desk Light Lamp
features: Star Wars Decor: Shine some light on your Star Wars: The Mandalorian fandom with this collectible Darksaber Desk Light. This cool LED light is perfect for adding a geeky flair to your home decor.
Authentic Design: Measuring approximately 24 inches, this themed desk lamp is based on the infamous Darksaber from Star Wars: The Mandalorian. Requires minimal assembly.

No Batteries Required: This Darksaber Desk Light is powered by USB (cable included) and features an in-line on/off switch for easy access. Hold the on/off button to dim the brightness of the LED light to a custom level.
Fun Home Decor: Let your fandom light the way with this Darksaber LED Desk Light. Perfect in game rooms, media rooms, and dorm rooms of Star Wars fans of all ages.

Official Merchandise: Add to your Star Wars collection with this officially licensed 24-inch Darksaber Desk Lamp. This is a cool accent piece for any fan looking to spice up their home decor with geeky room essentials.
description: SET THE MOOD WITH STAR WARS DECOR Bring the adventure to a galaxy near you! Flaunt your fandom with this Darksaber Desk Light from Star Wars. Modeled after the iconic lightsaber seen in Moff Gideon's clutches in Star Wars: The Mandalorian, this 24-inch table lamp looks great plugged into your computer and displayed on your desk. Fans may also recognize the Darksaber from its appearances in the Star Wars animated shows, including The Clone Wars and Star Wars Rebels. Once wielded by popular characters like Pre Vizsla, Sabine Wren, Bo-Katan Kryze, and Darth Maul, now fans can take home the black-bladed Darksaber and add it to their collection. LIGHT UP YOUR FANDOM This authentically designed desk lamp uses energy-efficient, long-lasting LED light and USB-power to keep your fandom shining for years to come. This fun piece of home decor mood lighting features an in-line on/off switch for easy access. You can also control the brightness setting by holding the on/off button to dim the LED light to a custom level. For Star Wars completists or new fans, this collectible Darksaber Desk Light makes for the perfect gift.
